title: clutia alaternoides var. genuina
intro: Clutia alaternoides var. genuina is a plant species that belongs to the Clusiaceae family, also known as the sterculiad family. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. Clutia alaternoides var. genuina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
